exec: pm.test("Studio slug matches expected value", function () { pm.expect(json.studio.slug).to.eql("blue-harbor-games"); });
pm.test("Current user request returns auth failure without configured token", function () { pm.expect([401, 403]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test("Managed studios request returns auth failure without configured token", function () { pm.expect([401, 403]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
var managedStudio = json.studios.find(function (studio) { return studio.slug === "blue-harbor-games"; }) || json.studios[0] || null;
pm.test("Studio titles request returns auth failure without configured token", function () { pm.expect([401, 403]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
var managedTitle = json.titles.find(function (title) { return title.slug === "compass-echo"; }) || json.titles[0] || null;
pm.test("Managed title request returns auth failure without configured token", function () { pm.expect([401, 403]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test("Managed title slug matches selected title", function () { pm.expect(json.title.slug).to.eql(pm.environment.get("managedTitleSlug")); });
